title: Classic Baby Mob Eyes
description: Restores the classic two-pixel eye style to baby mobs for better consistency with adult variants
body:
# What has changed?
The eye textures of baby mobs have been adjusted to:
- Use the classic two-pixel black-and-white format
- Better match the appearance of adult mobs
- Maintain Minecraft’s original minimalist aesthetic

The changes are subtle and designed to feel fully vanilla-friendly.

# Why was it created?
In Minecraft Tiny Takeover drop, nearly every baby mob feature eye designs that differ from the classic two-pixel black-and-white style used by their adult counterparts. This can create a slight visual inconsistency, especially in vanilla-focused worlds.

This resource pack restores the traditional two-pixel eye design to baby mobs, improving stylistic consistency across age variants.

# Impact on gameplay
This pack is purely visual and does not affect gameplay or mechanics in any way. It integrates seamlessly with vanilla textures and works well in both survival worlds and modpacks.

# Comparison between Vanilla and Classic baby mobs eyes
![Comprassion of Vanilla and Classic baby mobs eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61445cb8d52552fe2818709dbbd01755a56cef81.gif)

*Snifflet (baby sniffer) has wider eyes, just like its adult version. You can only see them below his ears.
